<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the Monolog package. * * (c) Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Monolog\Handler\FingersCrossed; use Monolog\LogRecord; /** * Interface for activation strategies for the FingersCrossedHandler. * * @author Johannes M. Schmitt <schmittjoh@gmail.com> */ interface ActivationStrategyInterface { /** * Returns whether the given record activates the handler. */ public function isHandlerActivated(LogRecord $record): bool; }
